hero.subtitle: Meetropolis isn't another meeting tool. It's the place where your team is together all day — with spatial audio, spontaneous hallway chats, and a world that reflects your culture.
hero.urgency: Set up today — your team is in tomorrow.

problem.title: Remote work often feels lonely.
problem.subtitle: Endless video calls. No spontaneous exchange. Team culture eroding with every new hire — until onboarding takes longer and good people quietly leave.
problem.card1Text: Your team sits isolated in front of screens. No hallway chat, no quick shout-out — just silence between meetings.
problem.card2Text: A video call for every little thing. The grid layout is exhausting, spontaneous alignment is impossible.
problem.card3Text: Chat here, video there, presence nowhere. Your team juggles too many tools — and loses track.

solution.title: Meetropolis puts an end to that.
solution.text: A virtual place where your team comes together — naturally. Walk through your office as an avatar, bump into colleagues in the hallway, and start a conversation on the spot. Like a real office, only better.

comparison.title: You already have tools for calls and chat. Meetropolis is what's missing in between.
comparison.subtitle: Three tool categories for modern teams — and where Meetropolis fits in.
comparison.card2Gap1: No visual presence in the team
comparison.card3Subtitle: A virtual place for daily collaboration
comparison.card3Strength2: Spontaneous encounters like in an office

pricing.title: More affordable than the alternatives. No compromises.
pricing.subtitle: Enterprise features at a fair price. Transparent and predictable.

social.title: Early teams, honest voices.
social.subtitle: Meetropolis is new — and we're upfront about it. What we don't have: ten thousand customers. What we do have: pilot teams using it daily, and a setup that delivers what it promises.
social.quotesSubtitle: Anonymised at the request of our Founders customers. Real quotes, no PR fluff.
social.quote1Text: We shrank our daily standup to 10 minutes because most things had already been clarified at the virtual desk. That was the moment I understood what spatial audio actually changes.
social.quote2Text: Day one of onboarding: new person gets an avatar and just walks through the rooms. Three days later, they know half the team by name. Before, that took three weeks.
social.quote3Text: What surprised us: we don't start the day with Slack anymore — we walk through the virtual office. The vibe is instant, and you can't generate that in Slack, no matter how many emojis.
social.pillarsSubtitle: Three promises we deliver to our first teams.
social.pillar1Text: No support bot. You talk to the founders. Feature requests hit the backlog same day.
social.pillar2Text: Early adopters keep their entry price. Even if we raise prices later, your plan is locked in.
social.pillar3Text: Servers in Germany, exportable anytime, self-hosting later. A real alternative, not a lock-in.

cta.title: Ready to open your virtual office?
cta.subtitle: Start your free 14-day trial. No credit card, no risk, no auto-renewal.
cta.honest: Honest: if your team is under 5 people and sees each other live every day, you probably don't need us.

consent.title: We use Meta Pixel
consent.description: We use Meta Pixel to improve our offering and show you relevant ads. Your consent is voluntary and you can revoke it any time via the “Cookie Settings” link in the footer.

billing.successText: Your payment has been processed. You will be redirected shortly...
billing.cancelText: The payment was cancelled. You can try again at any time.
